title: Gallows Humor Provides Respite From Mideast Wars
description: Arab digital creators on social media are turning out edgy material to cope with the conflicts and bring levity to a pain that often feels too raw.

title: Global Deforestation Slows, W.R.I. Report Finds. But Wildfires Are Taking a Toll.
description: In 2025, the world razed less forest than any other year in the last decade. The bad news: global warming is making wildfires more frequent and intense.

title: US, Latin America countries criticise China’s retaliation over Panama Canal

title: Quixote to lay off 70 staffers, wind down most of its sound stage business in another blow to Hollywood
description: A major Hollywood infrastructure player is scaling back sharply, cutting jobs and shutting down key parts of its studio services business.

title: Rays star Junior Caminero exits game after fouling ball off face in scary scene
description: Rays third baseman Junior Caminero took a baseball to the face after his own foul tip took a wild bounce and caught him on his right cheek on Tuesday night in Cleveland.

title: Katy Perry looks to build California youth camp, neighbors may have other plans

title: Fugitive found hiding out in the Philippines nearly 4 decades after allegedly raping and abducting Florida 7-year-old

title: Person threatening to jump freezes 101 Freeway traffic for hours as SWAT and LAPD descend
description: Authorities told The California Post the man was still on the pedestrian structure hours after first threatening to jump, with the situation ongoing and no clear timeline for reopening.

title: Knicks will scare a lot of playoff teams — if they keep playing like this
